info.title: Unexpected named argument: -help
info.description:
Usage - Js2IL [<InputFile>] [<OutputPath>] -options
GlobalOption                         Description
InputFile (-i, --input)              The JavaScript file to convert
ModuleId (--moduleid)                Compile an npm/CommonJS module id (e.g.
'turndown' or '@scope/pkg') instead of
a file path
OutputPath (-o, --output)            The output directory for the generated
IL
Verbose (-v)                         Enable diagnostics output to console
DiagnosticFile (--diagnostic-file)   Write diagnostics to a text file
(opt-in)
AnalyzeUnused (-a)                   Analyze and report unused properties
and methods
EmitPdb (--pdb)                      Emit Portable PDB debug symbols (.pdb)
alongside the generated assembly
StrictMode (--strictMode)            Strict-mode directive prologue
enforcement: Error, Warn, or Ignore
Error
Warn
Ignore
Version (--version)                  Show version information and exit

options.name: --analyze-unused
options.description:
Analyze and report unused properties
and methods
